summary: Live PR inventory shard classified without GitHub mutations. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive linked refs were scoped to route_security; open PRs remain open because the job disallows merge/fix/raise_pr and each listed PR needs maintainer, author, or technical correctness follow-up rather than closure.
